assertions.description: INCORRECT: The Dial Mini Module manufacturing output also analyzed 'Modular MacroPad-*.gbr' files (the full Mini Module gerbers), reporting 97 components and 102.2x99.2mm dimensions. The Dial Mini Module PCB is 52x100mm with 49 footprints. Both the Dial Module and Dial Mini Module directories contain the same wrong gerber set. This is a repo organization issue — no Dial-Module-specific gerbers were ever generated and committed by the designer.
